prompt: Write an SEO blog post about '5 automation tools every solopreneur needs in 2024'. Include H2 sections, meta description, and internal linking suggestions.

expectations.text: Output contains at least 3 H2 headings
Output includes a meta description under 160 characters
Output mentions at least 5 specific automation tools
Output follows a structured format (intro, body, conclusion)
Output does not contain slop phrases like 'delve', 'tapestry', 'game-changer'

prompt: Create a LinkedIn post about my experience transitioning from corporate to freelancing. Make it personal and engaging with a clear hook.

expectations.text: Output starts with an attention-grabbing first line (hook)
Output uses personal 'I' perspective throughout
Output contains between 150-300 words
Output includes a call-to-action or engagement question at the end
Output does not use generic AI phrases

prompt: Write a monthly newsletter about productivity tips for remote workers. Include a subject line, preview text, and main content with 3 actionable tips.

expectations.text: Output includes a subject line under 50 characters
Output includes preview text under 90 characters
Output contains exactly 3 actionable productivity tips
Output includes a P.S. section at the end
Output follows newsletter structure (greeting, content, sign-off)

prompt: Create a 5-email sales sequence for my productivity coaching services. Each email should have a specific purpose in the sales funnel.

expectations.text: Output contains exactly 5 distinct emails
Each email has a clear subject line
Email 1 is introduction/awareness focused
Email 5 is final call-to-action/urgency focused
Each email is under 200 words

prompt: Generate a YouTube video script (5-7 minutes) about 'How to build a personal brand on LinkedIn'. Include visual cues and timestamps.

expectations.text: Output includes at least 5 timestamp markers (e.g., [00:00])
Output includes visual cues in brackets (e.g., [B-Roll: laptop])
Output includes an intro hook in the first 30 seconds
Output includes a clear call-to-subscribe at the end
Output is structured for 5-7 minute runtime

prompt: Create a content calendar for April 2024 focused on 'productivity and remote work'. Include blog, LinkedIn, and newsletter content.

expectations.text: Output covers all days of April 2024
Output includes at least 4 blog post topics
Output includes at least 8 LinkedIn post topics
Output includes at least 4 newsletter topics
Output follows cascade repurposing model (hero content to splinters)

prompt: Audit this text for AI-generated patterns: 'In today's rapidly evolving digital landscape, leveraging cutting-edge AI tools can help you seamlessly navigate the complex tapestry of modern business challenges.'

expectations.text: Output identifies 'rapidly evolving digital landscape' as slop
Output identifies 'leveraging' as problematic verb
Output identifies 'cutting-edge' as slop phrase
Output identifies 'seamlessly' as slop adverb
Output identifies 'tapestry' as slop metaphor
Output provides a rewrite suggestion

prompt: Write a Twitter thread (8 tweets) about the biggest mistakes new freelancers make and how to avoid them.

expectations.text: Output contains exactly 8 tweets
Each tweet is under 280 characters
Tweet 1 is a hook that encourages reading
Final tweet includes a call-to-action
Thread covers at least 5 different mistakes

prompt: Generate a landing page copy for 'TaskFlow' - a new project management app for solopreneurs. Include headline, subheadline, 3 feature sections, and CTA.

expectations.text: Output includes a compelling headline under 10 words
Output includes a subheadline that expands on the value proposition
Output contains exactly 3 feature sections
Each feature section has a title and description
Output includes at least one call-to-action button text

prompt: Create a Voice DNA profile based on this writing sample: 'Look, I've been in the trenches. Built three companies, failed twice. Here's what actually works - no fluff, no theory. Just real stuff you can use today.'

expectations.text: Output identifies the tone as conversational/direct
Output notes the use of personal anecdotes
Output identifies contractions as a stylistic choice
Output captures the 'no fluff' value proposition
Output creates at least 5 voice attributes
